commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=8993d632a56b1c08ffe43b8a3f8928bfe70eca01)
commands.review_summary:
This branch makes `ReplyDispatcher.getFailedCounts` optional, guards failed-count reads in core, ACP, and Feishu dispatch paths, and adds a focused final-outcome counts test.

PR surface: Source 0, Tests +35. Total +35 across 6 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection. Current main calls `dispatcher.getFailedCounts().final` unguarded in the final-outcome helper, so any dispatcher variant lacking that method can reproduce the reported TypeError.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Maintainer review should decide the Plugin SDK contract and request current-head proof; the remaining blocker is not a safe automated repair without that API decision.

target.title: fix(auto-reply): guard optional getFailedCounts on dispatcher variants
target.author: alix-007
